description: A user on a 14-day trial requests an extension because they didn't have enough time to evaluate the product.

nodes.task_description: Identify the user's trial account and its expiration date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the account and sees the trial expires tomorrow.

nodes.task_description: Ask the user why they need an extension to gauge their level of interest and engagement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent learns the user was on vacation but is very interested in the product.

nodes.task_description: Grant a 7-day extension to the trial period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the trial expiration date.
